Ntc Of Mtn To Deem Facts As Admitted; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Req. For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00 And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF CAVAALRY INVESTMENTS, LLC'S Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted is DENIED. Plaintiff's motion has already been continued twice, on 9/20/12 and 10/3/12 to provide Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B by providing courtesy copies of the moving papers to chambers and Plaintiff has failed to comply. Court to prepare the order. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Ntc Of Mtn To Deem Facts As Admitted; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Req. For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00 And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Continued To Oct-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CAVAALRY INVESTMENTS, LLC'S Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted; Request For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00 is continued to October 12, 2012 at 9:00 am because of the moving party's failure to provide courtesy copies per Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall deliver courtesy copies of the papers filed in support of the motion by 4:00 p.m. on October 3, 2012 to Department 302. The courtesy copies shall be accompanied by a cover letter indicating the new hearing date. Judge Pro Tem: Richard Grotch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn To Deem Facts As Admitted; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Req. For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00 And Pos
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Continued To Oct-03-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID MARCOLINI, TEL. NO. 568-0742, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CAVAALRY INVESTMENTS, LLC'S MOTION To Deem Facts As Admitted; Req. For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00 IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 3, 2012 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT AND TO PROVIDE COURT WITH COURTESY COPIES. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported.
